reviews.comment:
Buscábamos un lugar para hacer tiempo y encontramos no solo un lugar cómodo, con wifi, toma corrientes para la pc y cargar cel, sino un lugar para picar algo, probamos una de sus pizzas de queso! Riquísima! Y aprovechamos la promoción en bebida! Me sorprendió poder aprovechar tantos beneficios en un solo lugar! Y pleno centro. Pagamos re cómodos con qr, todo lo que necesitaba en ese momento. 10/10

(Translated by Google)
We were looking for a place to kill some time and found not only a comfortable spot with Wi-Fi, power outlets for our laptops and phones, but also a place to grab a bite. We tried one of their cheese pizzas! Delicious! And we took advantage of the drink special! I was surprised to find so many benefits in one place! And right in the city center. Paying with a QR code was super convenient, everything I needed at that moment. 10/10
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2paNE1EaFNWR2hHZFZSNmJ6QlllR3hoTjJaSk9XYxAB
